user.title: Notification Center
user.description: Set up the Notification Center. After adding it, configure routing under Options and add notification rules as subentries.

abort.already_configured: Notification Center is already set up.

data.persons: Presence-mapped people — each with person, notify, media_player

trigger.title: When should this fire?
trigger.description: Name the rule and choose what condition triggers it.

trigger_match.title: Match a value
trigger_match.description: Fires while the entity matches this comparison.

trigger_template.title: Custom template
trigger_template.description: Fires whenever the template renders truthy.

priority.title: How important is it?
priority.description: Priority sets the push level, icon, color and re-alert cooldown. You can override any of these later.

channels.title: Where should it go?
channels.description:
Pick one or more delivery channels.

⚠️ Wall banner & dashboard navigation drive Lovelace surfaces only (Fully Kiosk / browser_mod). A native panel — an ESP32-S3 LVGL display or a Sonoff NSPanel — isn't Lovelace, so it won't pick these up; push to it with an ESPHome service call or MQTT instead.

data.tts_message: Spoken announcement (leave blank to speak the message; write a full sentence)

navigate.title: Force-open a view
navigate.description: Lovelace path the wall panel / app navigates to.

message.title: What does it say?
message.description: Title and message support templates. Leave blank to use the rule name. Icon and color override the priority default.

advanced.title: Delivery behavior
advanced.description: Sensible defaults are already applied from the priority. Tune only what you need.

data.items_template: Digest items template (renders the individual entries)
data.custom_actions: Custom actions — each with label, service, confirm, icon

actions.title: Clearing & snooze
actions.description: How this alert can be cleared. Stays in tray = no manual clearing (auto-clears when the condition resolves); Dismiss = the user can clear it.

send.name: Send notification
send.description: Create a one-off notification, routed by priority and channels.

dismiss.name: Dismiss
dismiss.description: Remove an active alert and clear its bell notification.

snooze.name: Snooze
snooze.description: Dismiss an alert and suppress it for a number of minutes.

run_action.name: Run custom action
run_action.description: Run a rule-defined custom action (e.g. a reset script) and clear the alert.

reload.name: Reload
reload.description: Rebuild rules and listeners without restarting Home Assistant.

import_rules.name: Import rules
import_rules.description: Bulk-create rule subentries from the packaged file or an inline list (idempotent).
